name: Oathforge Gate
anchor_kind: inspection gate for labor vows, work assignment, and cargo seals
operational_profile: Valid because reparative labor and favor-based restitution require entry-control offices to bind sentence, cargo, and movement together.
role_density_note: Emitted as matrix-stage administrative thickening rather than full office ledger.
supporting_logic: Built from existing polity logic as downward-and-outward operational fill.
